message:
fix: scan wisp_dependencies in getChildrenOfIssues and getChildrenWithParents (bd-8qc5)

Both functions hardcoded the dependencies table, missing parent-child
relationships stored in wisp_dependencies. This caused wisp children of
blocked parents to not appear as blocked in GetReadyWork and GetBlockedIssues.

Now iterates both tables with isTableNotExistError guard for pre-migration
databases, matching the dual-table pattern used in computeBlockedIDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
